β : Type u_2

M M' : Set β

hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G✝ M
G : Graph α β

        -- For any x ∈ S, x ∈ V(G, M), and hence x ∈ V(G)

          obtain ⟨e, he, hx'⟩ := hx
          have h₄ : e ∈ M := he
          have h₅ : e ∈ E(G) := hM.subset h₄
          -- Since e is in E(G), its endpoints are in V(G)
          simp_all [E, V]
          <;>
            (try
              {
                aesop
              }) <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [Set.mem_Ioi]
                <;> aesop
              }) <;>
            (try
              {
                cases e <;> simp_all [Set.mem_Ioi] <;> aesop
              })
        -- Therefore, S ⊆ V(G)
        exact subset_trans h₂ h₃
      · -- Case: No such matching exists (but this can't happen because hS is already assumed)
        exfalso
        exact h hS
    -- The conclusion follows from the subset relation
    exact h₁

intro S
    simp [Graph.IsMatching]
    <;>
    aesop

intro I hI
    rcases hI with ⟨M, hM, hI⟩
    have h : V(G, M) ⊆ V(G) := by
      intro x hx
      simp only [G.IsMatching.subset] at hM
      exact G.mem_V_of_mem_E (hM (by simpa [V] using hx))
    exact Set.Subset.trans hI h

intro S hS
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hS'⟩ := hS
    have h₁ : S ⊆ V(G) := by
      intro v hv
      have h₂ : v ∈ V(G, M) := hS' hv
      have h₃ : v ∈ V(G) := by
        -- Since M is a matching in G, M ⊆ E(G)
        -- Therefore, any vertex in V(G, M) is in V(G)
        have h₄ : ∃ (e : β), EdgeEndpoints G e |>.left = v ∨ EdgeEndpoints G e |>.right = v := by
          -- v is in V(G, M), so it is an endpoint of some edge in M
          have h₅ : v ∈ V(G, M) := h₂
          obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h₅
          refine' ⟨e, _⟩
          simp_all [V, EdgeEndpoints]
          <;> aesop
        obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h₄
        have h₅ : e ∈ M := by
          -- e is in M because v is in V(G, M)
          obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h₂
          aesop
        have h₆ : e ∈ E(G) := hM.subset h₅
        -- Since e is in E(G), its endpoints are in V(G)
        have h₇ : EdgeEndpoints G e |>.left ∈ V(G) := by
          simp [V]
          <;> aesop
        have h₈ : EdgeEndpoints G e |>.right ∈ V(G) := by
          simp [V]
          <;> aesop
        -- Therefore, v is in V(G)
        cases' he with he he
        · rw [← he]
          exact h₇
        · rw [← he]
          exact h₈
      exact h₃
    exact h₁

intro S hS
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hS⟩ := hS
    have h₁ : V(G, M) ⊆ V(G) := by
      intro v hv
      have h₂ : v ∈ V(G) := by
        obtain ⟨e, _, rfl⟩ := hv
        exact (V_mem_of_E_mem (G.mem_E_of_mem_matching hM (by aesop)))
      exact h₂
    exact hS.trans h₁
  
  ∀ (I : Set α), (∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M)) → I ⊆ G.vertexSet := by
    intro I hI
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hI⟩ := hI
    have h₁ : V(G, M) ⊆ G.vertexSet := by
      intro v hv
      have h₂ : v ∈ V(G) := by
        obtain ⟨e, _, rfl⟩ := hv
        exact (V_mem_of_E_mem (G.mem_E_of_mem_matching hM (by aesop)))
      exact h₂
    exact hI.trans h₁
